rows.notes: Clear printed year at top of page, no monetary columns present. Very legible, centred header.
Clear heading underlined; no amounts in the £ s d columns. Text fully legible.
Amount '330 10 0' is well aligned with the pounds/shillings/pence ruling lines and digits are crisp. All values fall in valid ranges.
Clear reading '718 6 0' in the right-hand £ s d columns; vertical alignment unambiguous.
Reads as '175 7 0' aligned in the pounds/shillings/pence columns. Hundreds digit slightly compressed by handwriting flourish — chosen as '175' based on alignment with the pounds column.
Amount '724 4 0' clearly aligned in the £ s d columns; slight ink variation on the '7' but context and alignment make '724' the unambiguous reading.
Description legible. Amount '65 0 0' is clearly written and aligned; no fraction marks.
Short form '20 do.' is clear and the corresponding amount '100 0 0' is crisply written in the pounds column.
Description and amount '50 0 0' are clearly legible and properly aligned in the £ s d columns.

This line shows an inline calculation '14 at 5 = 3.10.0' written next to the description but no amount is placed in the official £ s d columns — treated as an entry (sub-item). Text and calculation are legible.
Inline calculation '5.0.0' is visible beside the description but not written in the columnar £ s d; ink slightly lighter than surrounding text, so recorded as an entry with no column amount.
Inline '2.10.0' present but not aligned in the £ s d columns; treated as sub-item entry. Handwriting of the inline numbers slightly compressed, but readable.

Subtotal for the small fees group appears as '11 0 0' in the pounds/shillings/pence columns with a short rule above — no descriptive text immediately to the left. Aligned and digits clear; treated as a subtotal (total).
This appears as a small sub-heading introducing the following degree-fee entries; no column amounts on this line. Handwriting legible though slightly abbreviated.
Line shows calculation '19 at 2.6.0 = 2.7.6' (handwritten) but the computed value is not placed in the columnar £ s d; ink is slightly faint in places but the numbers are interpretable.
Shows '18 do 2.5.0' as a calculation next to the description; not placed in the main £ s d columns. Handwriting clear enough to read but slightly cramped.
Shows '13 do 1.12.6' inline; the inline figures are legible but not in the official columns. Treated as an entry/sub-item.
Subtotal '6 5 0' for the Small Degree Fees group is clearly written and aligned in the £ s d columns. Values validate (shillings <20, pence <12).

Description is somewhat abbreviated/contracted (reads as 'Name remov'dy' or similar) and shows an inline figure '25.5.10' but the amount placed in the columns is '40 0 0'. The column amount is clear; description is moderately ambiguous due to abbreviation.
Amount '74 4 11' is clearly aligned in the £ s d columns; pence '11' is legible. Description 'Gate Bill' is clear.
Description abbreviated ('Local Rate Compos fund Int') but readable. Amount '20 16 6' is clearly in the columns; shillings (16) and pence (6) fall within valid ranges.
Final page total '2916 3 5' is clearly written in the £ s d columns beneath a rule. Alignment with vertical guides is obvious and all values validate.
